name: Good Vibes
roasterNotes: Expect a fruit-forward, wine-like cup with incredible complexity. Blueberry jam on the nose, dark chocolate on the finish.
notes: I really liked this. Apparnely I like peanut butter notes.

name: Peanut Brittle
roasterNotes: Peanut Brittle is a classic, sweet and approachable single origin Brazil espresso. Roasted as a storm series offering with more development than our normal offerings to be a good daily driver and fit for milky flat whites, traditional espresso or crowd pleasing filter. In the cup we get sweet caramel, dark chocolate and peanut brittle.
notes: By far my favorite beans I have ever used for espresso

name: Southern Weather
roasterNotes: Southern Weather embodies everything we love about specialty coffee and has evolved into a foundational blend. We brew this in our own cafes as a “House” filter option and love how it balances the relationship between modern citric acidity flavors with full bodied chocolates. This comfortable, yet surprisingly complex and sophisticated coffee is approachable to all. It performs well on its own for the purist or with fats such as dairy or plant based beverages, making it a true answer for all coffee needs.
notes: There is a reason this is a gold medal winner.

name: Buffalo Blend
roasterNotes: This blend is sweet, mild, and roasted to be enjoyed everyday.
notes: It's a good daily drinker at a great price point.

name: Guatemala Huehuetenango
roasterNotes: Approachable and comforting with a rich, chocolatey body and subtle fruit sweetness.
notes: A crowd-pleaser. Perfect for guests who aren't into funky naturals.
